resource.name: NoDevice
resource.object: No device for controller at position: {0:Position}

resource.name: RecipeMinAmount
resource.object: Amount is below minimum allowed recipe amount {1:Data.MinAmount}

resource.name: RecipeMaxAmount
resource.object: Amount is above maximum allowed recipe amount {1:Data.MaxAmount}

resource.name: RouteNotAvailable
resource.object: Route {0:Route} not available on this system id: {0:SystemId}

resource.name: RoutePositionsNotAvailable
resource.object: Route position {1:Data.Position} not available on this system id: {0:SystemId}

resource.name: WrongAmountUnit
resource.object: Wrong amount unit on order line id: {0:OrderLine.Value}

resource.name: OverMaxAmount
resource.object: Over max amount on order line id: {1:Data.OrderLine}

resource.name: WrongProduct
resource.object: Wrong product for pack record id: {0:PackId}

resource.name: WrongPO
resource.object: Wrong PO for pack record id: {0:PackId}

resource.name: WrongLot
resource.object: Wrong Lot for pack record id: {0:PackId}

resource.name: RouteCapacityExceeded
resource.object: The amount of {1:Data.Amount} is greater than the {1:Data.Capacity} capacity of process unit id: {1:Data.Prunit}

resource.name: FormatFailed
resource.object: Failed to get error message for error code: {0:ErrorCode}
